en: Paul, an apostle- not from men nor through man, but through Jesus Christ and God the Father, who raised him from the dead-
zh: 作使徒的保羅 ，

en: and all the brothers who are with me, To the churches of Galatia:
zh: 和所有與我在一起的弟兄，寫信給加拉太的眾教會。

en: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ,
zh: 願恩惠平安從我們的父 神和主耶穌基督臨到你們。

en: who gave himself for our sins to deliver us from the present evil age, according to the will of our God and Father,
zh: 基督照著我們父 神的旨意，曾經為我們的罪捨己，為的是要救我們脫離現在這邪惡的世代。

en: to whom be the glory forever and ever. Amen.
zh: 願榮耀歸給他，直到永永遠遠。阿們。

en: I am astonished that you are so quickly deserting him who called you in the grace of Christ and are turning to a different gospel-
zh: 我很驚奇，你們這麼快就離開了藉著基督的恩呼召你們的那一位，去歸向別的福音。

en: not that there is another one, but there are some who trouble you and want to distort the gospel of Christ.
zh: 其實那並不是另一個福音，只是有些攪擾你們的人，想把基督的福音改變。

en: But even if we or an angel from heaven should preach to you a gospel contrary to the one we preached to you, let him be accursed.
zh: 但無論是我們，或是從天上來的使者，如果傳給你們的和我們以前傳給你們的福音不同，他就該受咒詛。

en: As we have said before, so now I say again: If anyone is preaching to you a gospel contrary to the one you received, let him be accursed.
zh: 我們已經說過，現在我要再說，如果有人傳給你們的和你們以前所領受的福音不同，他就該受咒詛。

en: For am I now seeking the approval of man, or of God? Or am I trying to please man? If I were still trying to please man, I would not be a servant of Christ.
zh: 我現在是要得人的歡心，還是要得 神的歡心呢？難道我想討人歡喜嗎？如果我仍然要討人歡喜，就不是基督的僕人了。

en: For I would have you know, brothers, that the gospel that was preached by me is not man's gospel.
zh: 弟兄們，我要你們知道，我所傳的福音，並不是照著人的意思，

en: For I did not receive it from any man, nor was I taught it, but I received it through a revelation of Jesus Christ.
zh: 因為這福音我不是從人領受的，也不是人教導我的，而是藉著耶穌基督的啟示來的。

en: For you have heard of my former life in Judaism, how I persecuted the church of God violently and tried to destroy it.
zh: 你們聽過我從前在猶太教中所行的：怎樣極力逼迫殘害 神的教會，

en: And I was advancing in Judaism beyond many of my own age among my people, so extremely zealous was I for the traditions of my fathers.
zh: 怎樣在猶太教中比許多本族同輩的人更激進，為我祖先的傳統分外熱心。

en: But when he who had set me apart before I was born, and who called me by his grace,
zh: 然而，當我在母腹裡就把我分別出來，又用他的恩呼召我的那一位，

en: was pleased to reveal his Son to me, in order that I might preach him among the Gentiles, I did not immediately consult with anyone;
zh: 既然樂意把自己的兒子啟示給我，使我可以在外族人中傳揚他，我就沒有和任何人 商量，

en: nor did I go up to Jerusalem to those who were apostles before me, but I went away into Arabia, and returned again to Damascus.
zh: 也沒有上耶路撒冷見那些比我先作使徒的，卻去了阿拉伯，然後再回到大馬士革。

en: Then after three years I went up to Jerusalem to visit Cephas and remained with him fifteen days.
zh: 過了三年，我才上耶路撒冷去見磯法，和他住了十五天。

en: But I saw none of the other apostles except James the Lord's brother.
zh: 至於其餘的使徒，除了主的弟弟雅各以外，我都沒有見過。

en: (In what I am writing to you, before God, I do not lie!)
zh: 在 神面前我敢說，我寫給你們的都不是謊話。

en: Then I went into the regions of Syria and Cilicia.
zh: 後來，我到了敘利亞和基利家一帶的地方。

en: And I was still unknown in person to the churches of Judea that are in Christ.
zh: 那時，在基督裡的猶太眾教會還沒有見過我的面，

en: They only were hearing it said, "He who used to persecute us is now preaching the faith he once tried to destroy."
zh: 不過聽說“那個從前迫害我們的，現在竟然傳揚他以前所殘害的信仰”，

en: And they glorified God because of me.
zh: 他們就因著我的緣故頌讚 神。
